narrative: Network egress remains blocked for the third consecutive run: api.coingecko.com, app.zyte.com, storage.scrapinghub.com, and api.resend.com all return 403 from the environment proxy, so live prices, scraped news, and email delivery are all unavailable. No price movement or headline data can be reported until the network allowlist is updated to permit outbound traffic to these hosts.
worth_watching: Update the network egress policy to whitelist api.coingecko.com (prices), app.zyte.com and storage.scrapinghub.com (news spider), and api.resend.com (email delivery)
Confirm the Scrapy Cloud coindesk_com spider is still scheduling and completing jobs so data is ready once egress is unblocked
Consider a fallback price source (e.g. a public API reachable from the current policy) to maintain continuity during proxy restrictions
